sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113981" key="xieze/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῑ-εζέω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῑ´-εσμα</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῑ-εσμός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῑ-εστός</orth>, vv. ll. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χιάζω, χιασμός,</foreign> etc. (qq. vv.).</entryFree>
